footer.tagline: Montreal's Vue.js community. Join us for meetups, talks and networking.
footer.newsletterDesc: Stay updated on upcoming events and news.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Have a question, idea or want to get involved? Don't hesitate.
contact.questionsDesc: For any questions about events, registration or the community.
contact.sponsoringDesc: Support the Vue Montreal community by becoming a sponsor. Several tiers available (Platinum, Gold, Silver, Bronze).
contact.speakerDesc: Have an idea for a presentation? Submit your topic.
contact.hostDesc: Your company can host a meetup? Contact us to discuss.

home.title: Welcome to Vue Montreal
home.subtitle: Montreal's Vue.js community
home.heroDesc: Meetups, talks and networking around Vue.js in Montreal.
home.eventsSubtitle: Join us for our upcoming meetups
home.communityDesc: Developers, designers and Vue.js enthusiasts regularly meet to share, learn and network. Technical talks, discussions and networking in a friendly atmosphere.
home.sponsorsDesc: Thanks to our partners who support the community.

tierAudience.silver: Logo on the site and community communications

levels.platinum: Maximum visibility, logo at top of page, mention in every communication
